overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a futuristic urban environment. The scene features a mix of industrial low-rise buildings and towering glass skyscrapers under a clear blue sky, with the player approaching and passing a large cylindrical advertising tower before continuing down a palm-lined city street.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with industrial garage and advertising tower

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through an open urban plaza toward a large cylindrical advertising tower

entered.detail: low concrete building with brown garage doors and mural art on the facade
large satellite dish mounted on the roof of the industrial building
tall cylindrical structure with multiple rotating holographic advertisement screens
green dumpsters lined up against the industrial building

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a sunlit urban plaza with a low industrial building featuring garage doors and a large satellite dish on the left. The player walks forward on asphalt toward a prominent cylindrical advertising tower displaying colorful holographic ads, with futuristic glass skyscrapers rising in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition area around the advertising tower

events.description: player looks upward at the cylindrical advertising tower while passing it on the right
passing the tower and transitioning onto a palm-lined city street

agents.ego_description: passing the advertising tower on the right and continuing down the street

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the upcoming street section
wooden utility poles with multiple crossbars and wires
low-rise commercial buildings with awnings and signage

segments.scene_description: The player passes the cylindrical advertising tower, briefly looking up at the rotating holographic displays, then continues past it as the scene transitions to a street lined with palm trees and utility poles. The industrial building falls behind as the urban canyon opens up.

events.description: pedestrian density increases as approaching the intersection
approaching a crosswalk with pedestrians crossing the street

agents.ego_description: walking down the palm-lined sidewalk toward a busy intersection with increasing foot traffic

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction
pedestrian walking on the sidewalk to the left side of the street

entered.detail: zebra crossing markings on the asphalt approaching the intersection
traffic signal pole at the intersection corner

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the player walking down a sunlit city street lined with palm trees and commercial storefronts. Pedestrian activity increases as the player approaches an intersection, with several people visible walking ahead and crossing the street. The cylindrical tower is now behind, and the focus shifts to the urban street life and distant skyscrapers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a quiet industrial plaza into a bustling, sunlit urban thoroughfare. It begins on an asphalt path beside a low industrial building with a large satellite dish, moving toward a prominent cylindrical advertising tower that glows with colorful holographic displays against a backdrop of glass skyscrapers. As the camera passes the rotating tower, the industrial structures recede and the environment opens up into a city street lined with palm trees and utility poles. The scene then shifts toward a more active commercial district, where the focus moves from the architecture to the increasing pedestrian activity near a busy intersection. Finally, the camera continues down the palm-lined road, leaving the advertising tower behind to immerse in the vibrant street life beneath a clear blue sky.
